query:
SELECT b.id, b.bl_number, b.vehicle_id, b.customer_id, b.vehicle_description, b.status,
       v.vin, v.make, v.model, v.customer_id as vehicle_customer_id,
       c.name as customer_name
FROM bills_of_lading b
LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON b.vehicle_id = v.id
LEFT JOIN customers c ON b.customer_id = c.id
ORDER BY b.id
LIMIT 20;
